meta.title: Support Open Source - Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Fund open-source AI tools, community resources, and documentation. Every dollar goes directly to development, testing, and infrastructure.

hero.title: Support open source
hero.subtitle: Amphibian Labs builds production-grade tools and gives them away for free. Your support keeps that possible.

items.title: Fund real tools, not promises
items.body: Every dollar goes to building, testing, and maintaining open-source software that businesses actually use. DocIQ alone has 1,100+ tests and processes real clinical documents.

items.title: Keep AI accessible
items.body: Enterprise AI tools cost six figures. Our tools are free and MIT licensed. Your support helps small clinics, community organisations, and sole traders access the same technology.

items.title: Support independent work
items.body: We don't take VC money or run ads. We're funded by client work and community support. That independence means we build what's needed, not what's fundable.

supporter.label: Supporter
supporter.description: Help keep the lights on. Your contribution covers hosting, CI/CD, and domain costs.

builder.label: Builder
builder.description: Fund a feature. Your contribution goes directly to new capabilities, test coverage, and documentation.

champion.label: Champion
champion.description: Sponsor a release. Your contribution funds a full development sprint - new document types, language support, or integrations.

transparency.title: Where your donation goes
transparency.note: 100% of donations go to open-source work. Client revenue covers business operations.

payment.note: Payment links will be set up via Stripe. For now, reach out directly to arrange a contribution.

cta.title: Prefer to contribute code?
cta.body: We welcome pull requests, bug reports, and documentation improvements. Every contribution matters.
